pi_items.source: Verified presence of OpenNeuro ds000030 task-taskswitch_bold data via curl, combined with the fact that setup_task.sh synthetically simulates participant behavioral performance mimicking it.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated task-switching behavioral data matching the CNP OpenNeuro ds000030 dataset structure. A python script in setup_task.sh generates 11 valid participants and exactly 1 explicitly contaminated participant labeled 'sub-99999' with robotic (<100ms) reaction times.
